column2: only 3 verifiable POIs (Administracao Municipal, Estacao Ferroviaria, Instituto Superior Politecnico); Places returns no usable shopping-dining or outdoors POI for Caala and none could be named with confidence

3 of 4 images uploaded (anchor/outdoors/culture); shopping-dining ungeneratable: all Places photos for New Market, Ranir Bazar, Monoharpur Bazar, Chawk Bazar, Sattar Khan Complex were interiors/night/crowds/watermarks, and text-only generations for Kandirpar and New Market hallucinated non-existent landmarks (rejected as wrong place)

no verifiable walkable POIs: Places returns only the town marker itself (photos are crowds/group portraits) and one school compound; listing coords (-10.97, 22.9) also appear wrong for Tshilenge (~-6.25, 23.77); cannot name 4 real POIs with confidence

no verifiable walkable POIs: Google Places has no coverage of Baoshan District, Shuangyashan (Heilongjiang); queries return only Baoshan Shanghai or parks in Jianshan District ~20km away; cannot name 4 real walkable POIs with confidence

No verifiable walkable tourist POIs: Places returns only a hospital, rural health center, and generic town photos; cathedral result is in Luilu (wrong town); market/stadium/church/square queries empty after multiple attempts

only 3 verifiable POIs (Sinpo Station, Sinpo Shipyard, Sinpo Class Drydock); Places returns no walkable shopping-dining POI in Sinpo and market/beach queries match wrong cities (Incheon/South Korea); cannot name a 4th real walkable POI with confidence
